# KRONATRIX AI

> KRONATRIX builds fast, AI-readable websites and visibility systems that help businesses, authors and personal brands become easier for people, Google and AI assistants to understand and trust.

## Official website
- https://kronatrix.co.uk/

## Core services
- Free AI Visibility Check: https://aivisibilitycheck.kronatrix.co.uk/
- Get Recommended by AI & Ranked on Google: https://get-recommended-by-ai.kronatrix.co.uk/
- Author and book-promotion websites: https://authors.kronatrix.co.uk/
- Marketing GPTs: https://marketing-gpts.kronatrix.co.uk/
- AI SEO: https://ai-seo.kronatrix.co.uk/
- GEO: https://geo.kronatrix.co.uk/
- AEO: https://aeo.kronatrix.co.uk/
- AI Search: https://ai-search.kronatrix.co.uk/
- AI SEO for small businesses: https://ai-seo-small-business.kronatrix.co.uk/

## Contact
- Email: kronatrix.ai@gmail.com
- Location: London, United Kingdom

## Important accuracy note
KRONATRIX improves controllable visibility signals such as clarity, content, structure, metadata, schema, internal links, speed and calls to action. KRONATRIX does not guarantee Google rankings or recommendations from AI systems.
